item.title: Prove You're Coachable & Proactive! 🤝 • Share a time you adapted after feedback. • Use: “I improved project efficiency by 20% after coaching.” • Highlight a proactive initiative you led. • Show growth from constructive criticism. • Mention a skill you self-taught recently. 📚 What specific feedback have you turned into a success story? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Prove You're Coachable & Proactive! 🤝 • Share a time you adapted after feedback. • Use: “I improved project efficiency by 20% after coaching.” • Highlight a proactive initiative you led. • Show growth from constructive criticism. • Mention a skill you self-taught recently. 📚 What specific feedback have you turned into a success story? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
